sections.content:
Looking at the image:
- Charcoal F is at left panel
- Black F is at right panel, overlapping with the yellow F
- Yellow F is visible on the left side of the black F
The black F moved right and is now overlapping more with the yellow F. The yellow F is visible on the left side of the black F's position.
Let me check the exact positions to see if they're fully overlapping now.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] > 5:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(p[0] for p in b)
        maxr = max(p[0] for p in b)
        minc = min(p[1] for p in b)
        maxc = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{minr},{minc}]-[{maxr},{maxc}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
